title: Fulton Ferry Crossing E-River
obv: FULTON FERRY CROSSING E-RIVER / BROOKLYN TO MANHATTAN
rev: Four Cents (ferryboat) Nassau / Admit the Bearer (all incuse)
desc: Fantasy token copying an authentic Fulton Ferry ticket design for a Brooklyn to Manhattan crossing.
notes: Listed as FF-NY-1 in the Atwood-Coffee catalogue. Manufactured in the 1970s and wholesaled to dealers for a few cents apiece. The design is copied after an authentic ticket issued by the Fulton Ferry.

title: NYCTA Bombardier R62A Inaugural Service Run
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY / BOMBARDIER (LOGO)
rev: R62A Good For One Ride / Inaugural Service Run
desc: Fantasy token referencing the introduction of R62A subway cars by the New York City Transit Authority.
notes: Listed as FF-NY-2 in the Atwood-Coffee catalogue. Associated with the Bombardier-built R62A cars and their inaugural service.
